title: Rebuild Memory Increase Brain Training Game App

requirements.text: Rebuild and redeploy the entire Memory Increase Brain Training Game application — frontend and backend — to generate a fresh canister deployment with a new working live URL.
acceptanceCriteria: App deploys successfully with a new canister ID
New live URL opens the Memory Increase app without 'Canister ID not resolved' error
All existing games (Card Matching, Memory Test, Pattern Memory, Sequence Memory, Sliding Puzzle, Stroop Effect, Speed Typing, Word Scramble, Missing Letter, Fill in the Blanks) are accessible
Home page loads with all game cards visible
Backend actor initializes correctly with user profile and high score functionality
Background music controls work in the header
Progress page loads and shows player stats when logged in
PWA manifest and service worker are active so users can install via 'Add to Home Screen'

constraints: Preserve all existing game logic, hooks, and components exactly as they are
Do not change the backend data model or Motoko actor structure
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui)
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or theme
